title: Knocked-out tooth - NHS
text:

You may have to pay for your appointment and treatment.
Cost of dental treatment
NHS dental treatment is free for some people, including:
children under 18 years old, or under 19 and in full-time education if you're pregnant or have had a baby in the past 12 months if you're on some benefits, including Income Support or Universal Credit If you do not qualify for free dental care, you will usually have to pay for treatment.
Find out more about NHS dental costs
